note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 2.3 cm x 2.1 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 49% slough, 51% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Debridement consult ordered.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 2.3 cm x 2.1 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 72% slough, 28% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Nutritional consult ordered.
